content: MACD combines multiple lagging indicators, compounding delay. Signal line crossovers generate many false signals in choppy markets. The default parameters (12,26,9) are arbitrary conventions without empirical foundation. MACD performs poorly in ranging markets, generating whipsaws. Histogram divergences are subjective. Academic tests show MACD strategies don't beat benchmarks after transaction costs. Like all momentum indicators, MACD suffers from trend-following drawdowns during reversals.
